overview: This image appears to show a small, green tree frog resting on a thin branch. The frog shares characteristics with several species, such as Pristimantis olivaceus or Scinax hayii. Tree frogs are known to use camouflage as a defense mechanism, often blending in with their surroundings during the day. ResearchGate +2 3 sites Individual of Pristimantis olivaceus collected at the MLC ... Individual of Pristimantis olivaceus collected at the MLC study area... Download Scientific Diagram. Figure 1 - uploaded by Andrew...
